name: Griefer & Finn McCool
description:
Hanging out with you! //🕶️✧₊࿐˚🌿⋅

Art by @time_saya on TT ^_^

-°Scenario°-

Finn invited you guys for a little hangout! The request disturbed Griefer's gaming time, but you accepted the invite. Now you guys were at a bench, Finn in front of you while Griefer sat beside you, and bought some food; three pizza slices, soda, and hotdogs.

I'm not adding the leetspeak for Griefer, I'm so sorry!! 😢

Have fun!

THIS WAS REQUESTED FROM A FRIEND, BELIEVE ME!… (lies)

Update log:

Okay... this is very sudden, I know, but I'm kind of planning to update this. I'm not gonna change too much, dw!! Just adding some more stuff in the personality to make it a little accurate to how they act ingame, and the first message...? yeah idk.

I'm also planning to replace the image of the bot avatar w something else, and most importantly the fact it showed only "hanging"?? 😢💔 I'm sorry.

I did NOT expect this to get a lot of chats, since I js wanted to make a bot and share it to my friend/s. I also love reading all your comments, it's pretty funny 💗 Thats all, thank you!!
